---
pagetitle: "Adrim Hamed | Portfolio"
format:
  html:
    minimal: true
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<script>
  const lang = (navigator.language || navigator.userLanguage || 'es').toLowerCase();
  if (lang.startsWith('es')) {
    window.location.replace('es/index.html');
  } else {
    window.location.replace('en/index.html');
  }
</script>
<noscript>
  <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=es/index.html">
</noscript>
```
